summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of My Ideas module for TA Engine. All 8 core API endpoints tested with 100% success rate. Ideas module fully functional with proper versioning, snapshot storage, and timeline management.
passed_tests: Health endpoint returns ok:true with proper fields
POST /api/ta/ideas creates new idea with snapshot (BTCUSDT asset, version 1)
GET /api/ta/ideas lists ideas with filters (4 total ideas, 2 BTCUSDT filtered, 4 active)
GET /api/ta/ideas/{id} returns complete idea with current version
POST /api/ta/ideas/{id}/update creates NEW version (1->2->3->4, not overwrites)
GET /api/ta/ideas/{id}/timeline returns version history (2 versions, 0 validations)
DELETE /api/ta/ideas/{id} successfully deletes idea (404 on re-fetch)
Idea stores full snapshot (3461 chars with technical_bias, bias_confidence, top_setup)
Version count increments correctly on each update
